title: 15 Sets Christmas Official Letter and Certificate from Santa Claus Including Nice List Certificate North Pole Writing Letter Christmas Stickers Envelopes for Family Party Favors
features: Package Includes: you will receive 15 pieces of Christmas letter paper, 15 pieces of nice list certificate, 15 pieces of North Pole envelopes and 3 pieces of Christmas stickers ; Sufficient quantity and style to meet your Christmas decoration needs and various DIY needs.

Exquisite and Colorful Design: This Christmas set is designed with many kinds of Christmas elements and they will be eye catching decorations at the Christmas party with beautiful colors and rich Christmas styles.

Credible Material: Vintage Santa Claus letter paper and certificate is made of great quality paper material, sturdy and durable, not easy to fade or tear,designed in bright and vivid colors, hard to fade, providing you with a service for a long time.

Enough Blank Space: there are blank space on the letter from Santa kit, so you can write your words of encouragement and good wishes for your friends or students while you are celebrating the most meaningful time of the year.
Meaningful and Great Gifts: this Christmas letter writing set for Family can be applied as Christmas gifts for kids to reward them for their good behavior this year and encourage them to do better.
description: Premium Christmas Official Letter and Certificate from Santa Claus! The ideal combination and rich quantity can meet your use and replacement needs, and you can share with your friends. Specifications: Size: The size of the Christmas letter paper is about 27 x 21 cm/ 10.63 x 8.27 inches, the size of the Santa Claus certificate is about 17.78 x 12.7 cm/ 7x 5 inches, the envelope measures approx. 23 x 16.2 cm/ 9.06 x 6.38 inches, and the diameter of the circular sticker is about 4.5 cm/ 1.77 inches. Quantity: 15 sets. Material: 300 GSM cardstock material. These Christmas sets will bring a lot of fun to your Christmas party. Write Down Your Wishes: there is plenty of blank space on the letter from Santa kit, so you can write your words of encouragement and good wishes for your friends or students while you are celebrating the most meaningful time of the year, infusing some holiday spirit. Wide Application: This Christmas sets are suitable for your home, office, classroom and party,etc.
